mapper.insert: INSERT INTO index_constituent ( index_code, symbol, name, exchange, sector, current_member, first_seen_at, last_seen_at, removed_at, source ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{symbol}, #{name}, #{exchange}, #{sector}, TRUE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NULL, #{source} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), exchange = VALUES(exchange), sector = VALUES(sector), current_member = TRUE, last_seen_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, removed_at = NULL, source = VALUES(source)
mapper.update: UPDATE index_constituent SET removed_at = COALESCE(removed_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND current_member = FALSE AND removed_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM index_constituent WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND current_member = TRUE
SELECT symbol FROM index_constituent WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND current_member = TRUE AND symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' ORDER BY symbol

SELECT i.symbol, COALESCE(p.name, i.name) AS name, p.logo, i.sector, p.finnhub_industry AS industry, p.market_cap, q.current_price, q.previous_close, q.open_price, q.high_price, q.low_price, m.pe_normalized_annual, m.pb_annual, m.roe_ttm, sl.integrated_score AS signalScore, sl.confidence AS signalConfidence, sl.tone AS signalTone, sl.calculated_at AS signalCalculatedAt FROM index_constituent i LEFT JOIN company_profile p ON p.symbol = i.symbol LEFT JOIN stock_quote_cache q ON q.symbol = i.symbol LEFT JOIN stock_metric_snapshot m ON m.symbol = i.symbol AND m.metric_date = ( SELECT MAX(metric_date) FROM stock_metric_snapshot WHERE symbol = i.symbol ) LEFT JOIN stock_signal_latest sl ON sl.symbol = i.symbol WHERE i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' ORDER BY p.market_cap DESC, i.symbol
